title: RRULE Todo Scheduling System - Instance Semantics and Overrides
excerpt: The recurring task model now treats the parent todo as the canonical recurrence definition and every single-occurrence change as an exception layered on top.

title: Drifting instanceDate problem
excerpt: Why recurring overrides drift when the parent sequence moves, and how the Kotlin-first backend should treat canonical occurrence identity going forward.
heroAlt: Coffee header for instance date drift documentation
